title: Skill Checks Demo
blurb: Proactive skill_check rolls — perception, athletics, arcana — including fail-forward and in-combat checks.

proving_hall.scene: A vaulted antechamber built to test those who would pass. Three challenges face you, and each rewards a different talent. To the left, one flagstone sits a hair proud of the rest — something may be cached beneath it, for a keen eye. Ahead, a jammed iron portcullis half-blocks an alcove; only raw strength will heave it clear. To the right, a rune-sealed door bars the way deeper, its lock a cipher of interlocking glyphs that a trained mind might read. There are no foes here — only the hall, and what each of you can do. (Each test is a proactive ability CHECK: d20 + the relevant ability modifier vs a DC; a check never adds proficiency.)

the rune-sealed door, its cipher deciphe.denied: The glyph-lock holds fast — the cipher has not yet been read, and the door will not open.

sentinel_span.scene: Beyond the door, a narrow stone span arcs over a black chasm whose bottom is lost to the dark. Midway stands a Bone Sentinel, an undead warden that lifts its blade as you approach — it will not let you pass. The span is barely two strides wide; a hard enough shove could send the thing over the edge. This is the last test, and the deepest point — there is nowhere further to go.
